overview: Treasure Valley Pain & Hormones provides integrated hormone replacement therapy, comprehensive pain management, and medical weight loss through a functional medicine approach. The clinic combines conventional medicine with evidence-based regenerative therapies to address underlying health conditions.
highlights: SGB for PTSD and Long COVID
Medical weight loss program (GLP-1, MICC, LIPO)
targetAudience: Adults seeking integrated pain management and hormone therapy with insurance coverage in the Boise area.
